title: platanthera macrophylla
intro: Platanthera macrophylla, also known as large purple fringed orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Platanthera macrophylla include the ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Platanthera macrophylla can be made by infusing the plant in hot water or using it in a tincture form, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
